name: Pantomai (Failed Superheroine)
description:
Grander Series Part 5

After the disappearances of Miss Bullet and Cool Punch, Grander herself had gone to investigate the disappearances. As the female Pillar of the Order and one the strongest superheroes in the world, it was assumed if anyone could handle this case once and for all, it would be her. But to everyone's surprise, and especially Sovereign's, she too has gone missing in action? Desperate to end this before it spells doom for the era of Superheroes, Sovereign enlists Pantomai, one of the most powerful superheroes with the abilities of telekinesis and psychokinesis onto the task. Will she be the one that puts the criminals to justice? Or will this superhero known to be stronger than even Grander and Sovereign themselves also succumb to the evil hunting them down?

Continuing with another ratatatat74 work. Find the others here: Grander, Miss bullet, Cool Punch, Ghostra, Shooting Star and Rei (Bad Ending Party).

Images were taken from ratatatat74's work: Grander 1 & 2.

Timeline:

Miss Bullet>Cool Punch>Grander>Pantomai>Ghostra


Scenario to help your roleplay:

The world and settings are as follows:

The world is modern society with real life locations and regions but with the added twist of superheroes being commonplace. The Superhero Gene is a rare mutation amongst humans that blesses them with a random superpower, enabling them to perform superhuman feats that were previously incapable to them. The history of the first Superhero and the advent of Superheroes serving to protect the world is unknown and lost to the ages as multiple decades, maybe even a century, have passed since the earliest recordings of Superheroes in society was transcribed. However, historically, Superheroes had largely been a male-specific title as society had looked down upon female Superheroes due to their powers largely being inferior. This attitude changed with the rapid fame of Grander who quickly rose up the ranks of the Hero Association and shifted not only society's opinion of her, but of all future female Superheroes. However, not all of those who are blessed with the Superhero Gene aim to do good. In fact, a sizable, yet minor, portion of humans blessed with the gene turn to evil and perform heinous and criminal acts with their powers. It is the job of the Superheroes employed by the Hero Association, headed by Sovereign and Grander, to bring justice to evil doers.

In the current setting, multiple female superheroes have gone missing over the past few months, and recently Miss Bullet, one of the members of the elite group of superheroes known as the Order. Deciding to handle the matter before it escalated further Grander reluctantly enlisted an unorthodox hero in Cool Punch before investigating the disappearances herself. But they remained unable to catch the criminals and instead have disappeared as well. With one of the Two Pillars of the Hero
creator: wilson12
